headline: Ripple Co-Founder Invests $10M in New Crypto Venture

article.title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
article.summary: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

headline: IMF: Tokenization To Boost $6.6T Settlement Market

article.title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
article.summary: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.

headline: Crude Steadies as Hormuz Traffic Surges 15%

article.title: Oil Steadies as More Supply Flows Through Strait of Hormuz
article.summary: Oil steadied as tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz increased further, adding to a gush of near-term supply while talks between the US and Iran continue.

headline: Canada Pipeline Shifts South Amid $10B Oil Blockade

article.title: Carney Keeps North BC Tanker Ban, Signaling Alberta’s Pipeline Will Go South
article.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.

headline: OpenAI Sells $42B Stake to US Government

article.title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
article.summary: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

headline: Russia Targets September Digital Ruble Launch

article.title: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
article.summary: Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina said major banks and retailers are on track to begin accepting the digital ruble by September 1.

headline: Securitize Lists 1st Dual NYSE Blockchain Shares

article.summary: President Brett Redfearn said the firm is in discussions to tokenize other IPOs "definitely ... within the next year.”

headline: eToro Leads $12.5M Funding in Extended Exchange

article.summary: "The partnership will focus on expanding access to global financial markets through next-generation on-chain infrastructure," eToro said.

article.summary: The US president calls it a ‘gift’ to the nation. Critics say he is racing past checks to stamp his mark on the capital
